reason: Contains ISIS-specific terminology including 'Khilafah' (Caliphate) news hashtag and 'Wilayat al-Barakah' (ISIS administrative division). References martyrdom operations (suicide attacks) against 'Nusayri' regime (derogatory term used by ISIS).
